name: Festive Lebkuchen
recipeIngredient: Grated peel and juice of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
Melt butter with brown sugar and honey in a medium saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Pour the mixture into a large bowl. Cool for 30 minutes. Add egg, lemon peel, and juice; beat for 2 minutes with an electric mixer on high speed. Stir in flour, allspice, baking soda, and salt until well blended. Cover; refrigerate overnight or up to 3 days.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease a cookie sheet. Roll out dough to 1/2-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface with a lightly floured rolling pin. Cut into 3-inch shapes using a 3-inch cookie cutter. Transfer the cutouts to the prepared cookie sheet. Bake for 15-18 minutes until edges are light brown. Cool for 1 minute. Remove from the wire rack and cool completely. Decorate with white frosting. Store in an airtight container.
